prompt: A stylized Japanese ukiyo-e woodblock print depicting an overgrown tree with excessively tangled, intricate branches twisting unnaturally, representing overfitting in machine learning. The tree appears dense and chaotic compared to a simpler, balanced tree in the background. Strong diagonal composition, flat unmodulated color planes, bold black contour lines, minimal shading, muted indigo, moss green, and ochre palette, visible woodgrain texture, stylized clouds and wind patterns. Traditional Edo-period aesthetic. --no photorealism, no gradients, no modern lighting, no 3D shading, no perspective realism
tradition_approach: Flat color planes, bold contour lines, diagonal composition, limited indigo-ochre palette, and woodblock texture to depict complexity through tangled organic forms
